{#- Version selector for the Furo sidebar. Rendered by sphinx-multiversion in every per-tag build: ``versions`` is a list of ``Version`` objects (one per matched ref), and ``current_version`` is the ref the current page was built from. Each entry's ``url`` lands at the same RELATIVE path as the current page in the target version — so a reader on ``/v0.7/cli.html`` clicking "v0.5" lands on ``/v0.5/cli.html`` without losing their place. When the build is not running under sphinx-multiversion (e.g. the dev's local ``sphinx-build`` preview) ``versions`` is undefined and the entire selector is skipped via the ``defined`` guard, so the local preview doesn't show a broken empty dropdown. -#} {% if versions is defined and versions %}
{% endif %}
